title: chrusion #5553
definition:
1) gold, both that which lies imbedded in the earth and is dug out of it
 2) that which has been smelted and wrought
    2a) of a gold coin
    2b) of golden ornaments
    2c) of precious things made of gold
nasbUsage:

 2) that which has been smelted and wrought
